§6Fluid Ores§f

§aMine special ores that yield valuable fluids and unique materials!§f

Fluid ores release fluids when broken and drop clathrates. Found in specific biomes and dimensions.

§6Oil Ores§f:
§b• Oil Sand§f — Deserts, §eY 10-80§f. Drops §e1§f Bitumen (more with Fortune). Releases §bCrude Oil§f.
§b• Oil Shale§f — Underground variant.

§6Magical Fluid Ores§f:
§b• Destabilized Redstone Ore§f — §eY 0-20§f, light §e7§f. Drops Destabilized Clathrate. Releases §bDestabilized Redstone§f.
§b• Energized Netherrack§f — Nether. Drops Energized Clathrate. Releases §bEnergized Glowstone§f.
§b• Resonant End Stone§f — End. Drops Resonant Clathrate. Releases §bResonant Ender§f.

§6Processing§f:
§bMagma Crucible§f melts ore → §e1,000 mB§f fluid. Clathrates melt → §e250 mB§f. Solidify clathrates with §bCryotheum Dust§f in Fluid Transposer.

§eTip§f: §9Silk Touch§f collects the ore block without releasing fluid.
